title: Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) in Splunk Enterprise for Windows through DLL Search‑Order Hijacking
description: Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) in Splunk Enterprise for Windows through DLL Search‑Order Hijacking
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise for Windows to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.3, 9.4.8, 9.3.9, 9.2.12, or higher.
